message:
fix(render, layout): prevent arithmetic underflow in cell run and overflow redistribution

In the render diff engine, ChangeRun::len() could underflow when x1 < x0
due to unsigned subtraction, producing a wrapped u16 value. Similarly,
the presenter cost model computed total_cells with a bare subtraction
that could panic or wrap. Both now use saturating_sub to safely handle
edge cases where coordinate ordering is unexpected.

In the layout overflow redistribution, the min-chain operated on u16
values which could silently truncate when overflow exceeded u16::MAX.
Casting to u64 before comparison ensures correctness for large overflow
values that arise with many layout segments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
